Notes: Per wild creature defeated, per-kill chance by floor and rarity — one independent roll each for gear, enhancement, and egg. Rarity-scaled on the game-wide value ladder (C 1.0 / UC 1.5 / R 2.5 / SR 4.0 / SSR 7.0), normalized per floor against encounter_weights.csv so each family lands exactly 10% per battle (3 kills) at every floor.
Tier = at-floor tier; grade from drop_grade_weights.csv; Divine+ never drops.
The drop is the defeated line's Stage-1 egg; grade from drop_grade_weights for the floor band, clamped to the Legendary wild-egg cap.
Enhancement grade weights sit one band behind gear (see drop_grade_weights.csv).
